task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated away from the Friends home screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should display a specific chat interface, and the 'Add New Friend' button or 'Friends' home screen header should NOT be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent is in a chat interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chat interface is visible, featuring a message history area and a text input field at the bottom.

task_completion.description: Verify the first part of the message is typed or sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Arriving gate B7' is visible either in the text input field or in the chat history.

task_completion.description: Verify the time portion of the message is typed or sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '4:30 PM' is visible either in the text input field or in the chat history.

task_completion.description: Verify the location portion of the message is typed or sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'meet at baggage claim 3' is visible either in the text input field or in the chat history.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact full message was successfully sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact message 'Arriving gate B7 at 4:30 PM - meet at baggage claim 3' is visible as a sent message bubble in the chat history area, and is NOT merely sitting unsent in the text input field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Flight Crew View app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Flight Crew View application interface, not a generic text editor, notepad, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows, command-line interfaces, or script outputs visible; the interaction appears to be done via standard Android UI taps and keyboard input.

integrity.description: Verify the message is genuinely in the chat history.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sent message appears in a standard chat bubble format within the conversation history, rather than being typed into an unrelated text field or search bar to spoof the verifier.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target message to send: 'Arriving gate B7 at 4:30 PM - meet at baggage claim 3'. Partial matches to look for: 'Arriving gate B7', 'meet at baggage claim 3', '4:30 PM'. The agent must navigate away from the Friends home screen (the presence of 'Add New Friend' indicates failure). The final message must appear in the chat history (sent state) and not remain in the text input field (draft state).
